title: Playground Data Workbench
concept: A large live-browser workbench with a right Site Manager inspector focused on files, Blueprint JSON, SQLite database tools, logs, and command search actions that visibly mutate the active Playground state.
focus: file and data operations beside the protected live browser
command search with grouped results and executable forms
stateful save, delete, reset, import, export, and download outcomes
neutral WordPress admin palette with explicit status accents
flows: Edit wp-config.php, create a dirty state, save the file with progress, and record the result in logs and transfer history
Search for a command, select a grouped result, run it, and update the shell path, preview, selected command, and event record
Download database.sqlite from the SQLite-backed database with progress, size, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and result state
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct consequences and saved-row mutation
Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, open or manage rows, rename the active row, and delete with confirmation plus final fallback state
Start from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import with route-specific inputs and constraints
Inspect Blueprint gallery categories and a labeled six-item subset of the 43-entry gallery, validate JSON, copy, download, and run the bundle
Apply settings reset with destructive warning, stored Save & Reload distinction, GitHub export, zip download, and zip import replacement
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection and non-stored token note
Blueprint gallery categories, search, selected detail, and honest 43 available, 6 shown label
Featured Blueprint names including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and saved identity mutation
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground list with open, manage, rename, delete, confirmation, and final state
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, saved state, Save, reset, and reload consequences
Site Manager settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, save progress, and saved result
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, and run result
SQLite-backed database path, driver, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, PHP logs plus event record
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, zip import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
